subcodes.first_line: Thy missive hath attained unto Our presence, and concerning that which thou didst write regarding the division, He hath declared: How excellent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب لدی الوجه حاضر و آنچه در فقره تقسیم مرقوم داشتند فرمودند نعم ما
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @unity in diversity
